name: polariton-sim
description: An open-source, in-browser cavity-QED instrument (Rust→WASM): quantum core validated against QuTiP 5.3 / NumPy goldens; transfer-matrix optics & Holstein–Tavis–Cummings vibronics against closed-form analytic benchmarks.

scripts.test:all: vitest run && node wasm/validate_wasm.cjs && cargo test --manifest-path wasm/Cargo.toml

//test: Two engines, on purpose. engine/ is a closed-form analytic oracle (Marcus/optics/HTC) used as a self-check; the app SHIPS the Rust->WASM quantum core in wasm/. `npm test` runs the analytic vitest suite AND re-checks the shipping WASM core against its QuTiP 5.3 / NumPy goldens through the Node boundary (no Rust toolchain needed). `npm run test:quantum` runs the full native cargo golden suite (22 tests, needs Rust). CI gates the cargo suite + the Node boundary recheck (.github/workflows/ci.yml); see docs/VALIDATION.md and CONTRIBUTING.md.
